productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Predito Blue Sports Shoes
description: Short, sharp movements and incredible ball control are yours with these adidas Predito TRX FG soccer cleats. They feature a light synthetic leather upper for a soft touch and clean strike, a comfortable EVA insole, and the superior grip of the Traxion FG outsole. Upper Synthetic leather upper for light weight and durability Asymmetrical lacing for better ball contact Comfortable textile lining Brand logo embossed on the tongue and at the back of the collar Midsole EVA insole for comfort Die-cut EVA midsole for comfort and shock absorption Outsole Traxion FG outsole for grip and comfort on firm natural surfaces shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
